title: Revolve Group 2023 Full Year Earnings Summary
text: Revolve Group reported mixed results for 2023, with net sales declining 3% year-over-year to $1.07 billion. The company's net income fell 52% to $28.1 million, while adjusted EBITDA decreased 52% to $43.4 million. The REVOLVE segment generated $904.5 million in sales (down 2%), while the FWRD segment contributed $164.2 million (down 9%). Gross margin compressed to 51.9% from 53.8% previously, though the company noted improvement throughout the year as inventory rebalancing efforts took hold. Active customers grew 9% to 2.54 million, though average order value declined 2% to $297. Co-CEO Michael Mente emphasized the business's strength: Our profitable and cash generative business remains a key competitive advantage that has enabled us to invest in longer-term growth initiatives throughout the cycle. The company generated $43.3 million in operating cash flow and $39.1 million in free cash flow during 2023—increases of 85% and 114% respectively. The balance sheet remained debt-free with $245.4 million in cash.
